prestazioni: Engine swap to L15B7 (1.5L turbocharged DOHC i-VTEC) with a custom-built BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, paired with a PRL Motorsports intercooler and a custom 3-inch titanium exhaust system featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium muffler for optimized backpressure and weight reduction

Full K-Tuned engine management system with a custom ECU tune mapped on a Dynapack hub dyno, targeting 280+ WHP on E85 fuel with a 22 psi boost limit, utilizing a Hondata K-Pro V4 for real-time data logging and knock detection

Custom-built 6-speed manual transmission conversion using a K20C2 gearbox from the Civic Type R (FK8), reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gear set (2.65, 1.80, 1.30, 1.04, 0.83, 0.68) and a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel for durability under high torque loads
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (Freed G-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front lip, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with matte gunmetal accents for a stealth aggressive look

Custom 18x9.5 +35 Enkei RS05RR wheels in Hyper Black with 235/40R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, fitted with a custom bolt-on fender flair extension kit from Garage Vary to accommodate the wider track width

Full interior overhaul featuring Recaro SP-G (Kazuki) seats with custom red Alcantara and black leather upholstery, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum shift knob from Buddy Club for the manual transmission conversion
